notes: All 7 sites returned HTTP 403 from WebFetch. This is almost certainly WAF/bot-protection (Cloudflare or similar) blocking the automated fetch agent — not true downtime. SSL checks returned no data because outbound raw TCP (openssl s_client) is blocked in this environment. Manual spot-check recommended before treating these as real outages.
